steps.title: Identify the aspect being evaluated
steps.content: The women test individual trees to see if sap will appear. The sentence explains the variation they're checking for: trees have different individual characters—some ready to yield sap, others reluctant.

steps.title: Match the elaboration to the answer
steps.content: The sentence elaborates on the individual readiness of trees—the specific aspect the women are testing for. The other three options either shift focus from tree characteristics or broaden to a relationship rather than assessing individual variation. That matches choice D — D is correct.
